## Type of Change

Please check the appropriate box:

- [ ] **Bug Fix**: A non-breaking change which fixes an issue.
- [ ] **Feature**: A non-breaking change which adds new functionality.
- [ ] **Documentation**: Changes to documentation or help files.
- [ ] **Research Module**: Addition or refinement of EEG/qEEG analysis logic.
- [ ] **Optimization**: Performance improvements without logic changes.
- [ ] **Refactor**: Code cleanup or restructuring without logic changes.

## Research Integrity Checklist

- [ ] **Non-Diagnostic Framing**: All outputs and documentation preserve NeuroVynx’s research-oriented, non-diagnostic positioning.
- [ ] **Documentation Updated**: Relevant docs or safety guidelines have been updated.
- [ ] **Validation Notes**: Brief verification or validation notes are included for any DSP/qEEG logic changes.
